title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, presents data showing rapid adoption of AI agents in coding. He claims 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and engineers are transitioning to managing autonomous agent teams rather than writing code directly.
